name: infobyte-faraday-v5-22
description: OctoBus package for Faraday v5.22.0 workspace, host, and vulnerability APIs.

InfobyteFaradayV522.Faraday/ListHosts.name: list-hosts
InfobyteFaradayV522.Faraday/ListHosts.description: List Faraday hosts in a workspace.

InfobyteFaradayV522.Faraday/CreateHost.name: create-host
InfobyteFaradayV522.Faraday/CreateHost.description: Create a Faraday host in a workspace.

InfobyteFaradayV522.Faraday/ListVulnerab.name: list-vulnerabilities
InfobyteFaradayV522.Faraday/ListVulnerab.description: List Faraday vulnerabilities in a workspace.

InfobyteFaradayV522.Faraday/GetVulnerabi.name: get-vulnerability
InfobyteFaradayV522.Faraday/GetVulnerabi.description: Get one Faraday vulnerability by object ID.

InfobyteFaradayV522.Faraday/CreateVulner.name: create-vulnerability
InfobyteFaradayV522.Faraday/CreateVulner.description: Create a Faraday vulnerability in a workspace.
